name: Alero Dupont Circle

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the live Dupont Toast representation and six captured restaurant-issued food pages reviewed on 2026-07-14.

The corrected catalog contains 126 current food and nonalcoholic formulations and 193 source presentations across eight categories: 125 live Toast products plus the restaurant-issued Fried Calamari, with 68 restaurant-issued presentations.
All 42 frozen rows remain current, but the frozen extraction omitted 84 current formulations and fabricated an adjacency-based variant group on every row.
The current Toast representation also exposes a bag fee, an Appetizer divider, featured duplicates, and Mexican/Irish alcoholic coffees; those are not food/nonalcoholic formulations.

Rapido Salad and Alero Salad publish identical restaurant-issued formulation text and are consolidated as two presentations of one formulation. Responsive-layout duplicates and official lorem-ipsum placeholders are not promoted into products or ingredient claims.

Alero publishes selected fixed ingredient descriptions on six restaurant-issued Dupont food pages and additional restaurant-controlled product names through its linked Toast catalog, but no complete recipes or item-level allergen matrix.
Sixty-four current formulations have positive contains signals from direct published components or mandatory named food formats; 62 remain unavailable for fixed allergen data.

Ten current frozen rows underreported fixed signals: Alero Pork Ribs, Alero Salad, Apple Almond Salad, Caesar Salad, Chicken Tamales, Fish Tacos, Salmon Mexicano, Seafood Salad, Seafood Soup, and Taco Salad.

Configurable proteins and fillings are not promoted into fixed claims. Name-only sauces, soups, sides, and products without a mandatory allergen remain unavailable rather than receiving culinary guesses.
No current restaurant-issued allergen matrix, global may-contain statement, shared-equipment statement, or negative safety claim was found.

The frozen generic Toast extraction retained only 42 of 125 live food/nonalcoholic Toast products, flattened all real categories to Mexican, and assigned the next product or section label as variantGroup on every row.
It did not merge the six restaurant-issued food pages, so it omitted fixed descriptions, the official-site-only Fried Calamari, and the identical Rapido Salad presentation.
The correction rebuilds the live category structure, consolidates cross-surface aliases and presentations, excludes nonproducts/alcohol-only rows, and separates fixed evidence from unavailable data.
The shared row classifier now preserves the real configurable Toast product Queso Dip With while retaining its dangling-boundary protection for unverified matrix fragments.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Exhaustively reviewed the current web-accessible Dupont Toast representation: 129 non-featured source rows across eight sections, resolving to 125 food/nonalcoholic formulations after excluding the bag fee, Appetizer divider, and two alcohol-only coffees.
notes: Featured products duplicate their real section products and are not counted again.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Direct command-line capture returned HTTP 403; the current menu remained accessible through the reviewed Toast web representation and stable item links.

Captured and exhaustively reviewed all six restaurant-issued Dupont food pages: appetizers, soup/salads, seafood, Mexican entrees, meat/poultry, and sides, yielding 68 source presentations and fixed descriptions for the core catalog.
notes: Every page capture has a retained HTML artifact and SHA-256 hash.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Found current fixed menu descriptions and a raw-food advisory, but no complete item-level allergen matrix, recipe disclosure, cross-contact statement, or allergen-specific legend.
notes: The raw-food advisory is a general safety warning and is not converted into item-level may-contain claims.

findings.summary: The frozen catalog retained only 42 of 126 current formulations, flattened eight categories, and attached a fabricated adjacent variant group to every row.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 126 formulations and 193 source presentations across eight categories, restored all 84 omissions, consolidated aliases/duplicates, removed nonproducts and alcohol-only rows, and eliminated every fabricated variant group.

findings.summary: Ten current frozen rows omitted fixed allergens directly supported by restaurant-issued descriptions or mandatory named formats.
findings.resolution: Mapped 64 positive current formulations, corrected all ten frozen underreports, left 62 unsupported rows unavailable, and did not promote configurable choices or inferred recipes into fixed claims.

findings.summary: Generic Toast extraction lost categories, most products, official descriptions, cross-surface aliases, configuration context, and rejected one stable configurable product as a dangling boundary.
findings.resolution: Prepared a guarded current-menu manifest with exact formulation/presentation invariants and narrowly exempted verified configurable restaurant-linked products from the dangling-boundary heuristic.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a 126-formulation, 193-presentation Alero Dupont catalog with 64 fixed-positive rows, 62 unavailable rows, all 42 frozen rows reconciled, and stable classifier behavior.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/restaurant-verification/alero-isolated.generated.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 126 items, eight categories, 64 fixed-positive rows, 62 unavailable rows, all sampled restorations, exclusion of nonproducts/alcohol, zero variant groups, classifier retention, and idempotent Alero guard behavior)

notes: Corrected snapshot SHA-256: 3d194cbc08e461dedc98a5e159e7aecb8e0a076ba39c1b7aac87156b00ac53fa.
Reconciliation counts: {"dispositions":{"exact_match":42},"allergens":{"mismatch":10,"accurately_unavailable":26,"verified":6},"mismatchKinds":{"underreported":10}}.
Current corrected catalog counts: 126 formulations, 193 presentations, eight categories, 64 fixed-positive rows, and 62 unavailable rows.
